title: Crossref Funder Registry reconciliation + OpenAlex/DOI output linking
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). Funders are reconciled to the Crossref Funder Registry (CC0) and outputs linked via OpenAlex/DOI (CC0), human-confirmed.
objective: Reconcile funders to the Crossref Funder Registry and link outputs to OpenAlex/DOI identifiers, with human-confirmed, reversible, provenance-preserving merges.
acceptanceCriteria: Funders reconciled to the Crossref Funder Registry via explicit matching; precision over recall; human-confirmed.
Outputs linked to OpenAlex/DOI identifiers where available; links carry provenance.
No automatic merge without human confirmation; merges reversible and provenance-preserving.
output: data/reconciliation/funder-openalex/ reconciled funder + output-link records, committed via PR.
